pattern: sitemap-data.xml is not valid XML: XML or text declaration not at start of entity
reason: Jekyll template generates XML declaration offset by Liquid whitespace
cleanup: Fix sitemap-data.xml template to ensure XML declaration is at byte 0 with no leading whitespace

pattern: unsupported fake field 'review' in JSON-LD at atlas/ai-operations/ai-agent-for-sap-support/index.html
reason: Existing Atlas page uses 'review' in structured data for article review status, not product review
cleanup: Refactor structured data to use 'editorialReview' or remove if not justified by visible content
